rules.rule_text:
rule Hangover_Auspo
{
	meta:
		author = "Alienvault Labs"
		reference = "https://www.alienvault.com/blogs/labs-research/microsoft-office-zeroday-used-to-attack-pakistani-targets"

	strings:
		$a1 = "Mozilla/4.0 (compatible; MSIE 6.0; Windows NT 5.1; SV2)"
		$a2 = "POWERS"
		$a3 = "AUSTIN"

	condition:
		all of them
}
